mapper.select: SELECT point_id, member_idx, point_amount, change_amount, change_reason, change_date, point_status FROM point WHERE member_idx = #{memberIdx} ORDER BY change_date DESC, point_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO point ( member_idx, point_amount, change_amount, change_reason, change_date, point_status ) VALUES ( #{member_idx}, #{point_amount}, #{change_amount}, #{change_reason}, #{change_date}, #{point_status} )
